name: Protein Concentration by Centrifugal Ultrafiltration (Amicon Ultra)
nameCn: 离心超滤浓缩蛋白（Amicon Ultra）

note.en: MWCO should be 3–6× smaller than protein MW. Common: 3 kDa (peptides/small proteins), 10 kDa (general), 30 kDa (>60 kDa proteins), 50 kDa (>100 kDa). Amicon Ultra-4 (4 mL), Ultra-15 (15 mL), Ultra-0.5 (0.5 mL) available.
note.zh: MWCO 应为蛋白 MW 的 1/3–1/6。常用：3 kDa（多肽/小蛋白）、10 kDa（通用）、30 kDa（>60 kDa 蛋白）、50 kDa（>100 kDa）。可选 Amicon Ultra-4（4 mL）、Ultra-15（15 mL）、Ultra-0.5（0.5 mL）。

components.name: 2. Pre-wet membrane: add 500 µL storage buffer; spin 2 min at 4,000×g; discard

note.en: Removes glycerol storage solution from new membranes. Some protocols skip this step.
note.zh: 去除新膜上的甘油储存液。部分方案可跳过此步。

components.name: 3. Load protein sample into concentrator (do not exceed max volume)

note.en: Max fill: 4 mL (Ultra-4), 15 mL (Ultra-15). Leave 10% headspace. Apply sample gently (do not pipette directly onto membrane).
note.zh: 最大体积：Ultra-4 为 4 mL，Ultra-15 为 15 mL。留 10% 空间。轻柔加样（勿直接往膜上吸打）。

note.en: Do NOT exceed 4,000×g (damages membrane). 4°C preferred for protein stability. Check volume every 5–10 min — do not let membrane go dry (protein aggregates irreversibly on dry membrane).
note.zh: 不超过 4,000×g（损坏膜）。4°C 保护蛋白稳定性。每 5–10 min 检查一次体积——绝不让膜干燥（蛋白会不可逆地聚集在干膜上）。

components.name: 5. Continue centrifugation until desired volume reached

note.en: Typical: 50-fold concentration takes ~30–60 min. Stop at ≥50 µL (Amicon Ultra-4) to allow easy recovery. Mix gently by pipetting up/down every 15–20 min to prevent boundary layer effect.
note.zh: 典型 50 倍浓缩约 30–60 min。停在 ≥50 µL（Ultra-4）以便回收。每 15–20 min 轻柔吸打混匀，防止边界层效应。

note.en: Invert device, place in recovery tube, spin 2 min at 1,000×g. Typical recovery: 90–95%. Rinse membrane with 20–50 µL buffer for maximum recovery.
note.zh: 倒置装置，放入回收管，1,000×g 离心 2 min。典型回收率：90–95%。用 20–50 µL 缓冲液冲洗膜，最大化回收。

components.name: 7. Buffer exchange (optional): dilute 10× in new buffer, repeat concentration (×3 cycles)

note.en: 3 cycles of 10× dilution + concentration removes >99.9% of original buffer components. Equivalent to dialysis but much faster (30 min vs 6–12 h).
note.zh: 3 次 10 倍稀释 + 浓缩循环，去除 >99.9% 原缓冲液成分。效果等同透析，但速度快（30 min vs 6–12 h）。

components.name: 8. Quantify concentrated protein (BCA or Bradford); run SDS-PAGE QC

note.en: Compare before and after by SDS-PAGE to check for aggregation or protein loss.
note.zh: 浓缩前后 SDS-PAGE 对比，检查是否有聚集或蛋白损失。

detailedSteps.en: Select appropriate Amicon Ultra filter based on protein molecular weight. MWCO should be 3–6× smaller than the protein MW. Available sizes: Ultra-0.5 (0.5 mL), Ultra-4 (4 mL), Ultra-15 (15 mL).
detailedSteps.zh: 根据蛋白分子量选择合适的 Amicon Ultra 滤器。MWCO 应为蛋白 MW 的 1/3–1/6。规格：Ultra-0.5（0.5 mL）、Ultra-4（4 mL）、Ultra-15（15 mL）。

detailedSteps.en: Pre-wet new membrane: add 500 µL of your storage buffer (or water) to the concentrator. Centrifuge at 4,000×g, 2 min, 4°C. Discard flow-through.
detailedSteps.zh: 新膜预湿：向浓缩器中加 500 µL 储存缓冲液（或水）。4,000×g 离心 2 min，4°C。弃滤过液。

detailedSteps.en: Load protein sample into the concentrator. Do not exceed maximum volume: 4 mL (Ultra-4) or 15 mL (Ultra-15). Leave ~10% headspace. Apply sample gently — do not pipette directly onto the membrane.
detailedSteps.zh: 将蛋白样品加入浓缩器。不超过最大体积：Ultra-4 为 4 mL，Ultra-15 为 15 mL。留约 10% 空间。轻柔加样——勿直接往膜上吹打。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 3,500–4,000×g in a swinging-bucket rotor at 4°C. Check every 5–10 min. Do NOT exceed 4,000×g — this damages the membrane and causes protein leakage.
detailedSteps.zh: 摆桶转子 3,500–4,000×g 离心，4°C。每 5–10 min 检查一次。不超过 4,000×g——会损坏膜并导致蛋白漏过。

detailedSteps.en: Every 15–20 min, stop centrifuge and gently pipette sample up/down 2–3 times to resuspend any concentrated protein at the membrane bottom (boundary layer effect). Return to centrifuge.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 15–20 min 停止离心，轻柔吸打样品 2–3 次重悬膜底部的浓缩蛋白（边界层效应）。放回离心机。

detailedSteps.en: Continue centrifugation until desired concentration is reached. For Amicon Ultra-4: stop at ≥50 µL to allow easy recovery. For Amicon Ultra-15: stop at ≥200 µL.
detailedSteps.zh: 继续离心直到达到目标浓度。Ultra-4：停在 ≥50 µL 以便回收。Ultra-15：停在 ≥200 µL。

detailedSteps.en: To recover concentrated protein: invert the device in a clean collection tube. Centrifuge at 1,000×g for 2 min at 4°C. The concentrate will collect in the bottom of the collection tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 回收浓缩蛋白：将装置倒置放入干净的收集管。1,000×g 离心 2 min，4°C。浓缩液会聚集在收集管底部。

detailedSteps.en: For maximum recovery: add 20–50 µL of your desired buffer to the membrane, pipette up/down to rinse, then invert and spin again at 1,000×g for 1 min. Combine with main concentrate.
detailedSteps.zh: 最大化回收：膜上加 20–50 µL 目标缓冲液，吸打冲洗，倒置 1,000×g 再离心 1 min。与主浓缩液合并。

detailedSteps.en: For buffer exchange: add the desired buffer to bring the sample back to the original volume (e.g., add 4 mL to Ultra-4). Concentrate again to the desired volume. Repeat 3× to achieve >99.9% buffer exchange.
detailedSteps.zh: 换液：加目标缓冲液恢复原始体积（如 Ultra-4 加 4 mL）。再浓缩到目标体积。重复 3 次以实现 >99.9% 换液。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify concentrated protein by BCA or Bradford assay. Run SDS-PAGE before and after concentration to check for aggregation or protein loss. Store at 4°C (short-term) or −80°C with 10% glycerol (long-term).
detailedSteps.zh: BCA 或 Bradford 法测定浓缩蛋白浓度。浓缩前后 SDS-PAGE 检查聚集或蛋白损失。4°C 保存（短期）或 −80°C 加 10% 甘油保存（长期）。

briefSteps.en: Pre-wet membrane → Load sample (≤max vol) → Spin 3,500–4,000×g 4°C, check q15 min → Recover by inverting & spin 1,000×g 2 min → (Optional: buffer exchange ×3 cycles) → Quantify & SDS-PAGE QC
briefSteps.zh: 预湿膜 → 加样（≤最大体积）→ 3,500–4,000×g 4°C 离心，每 15 min 检查 → 倒置 1,000×g 2 min 回收 →（可选：3 次换液循环）→ 定量 + SDS-PAGE 质检

note.en: Concentrated protein can be stored at 4°C for days or at −80°C with 10% glycerol for months
note.zh: 浓缩蛋白可 4°C 保存数天或加 10% 甘油 −80°C 保存数月

note.en: After buffer exchange, protein can be used immediately or stored at −80°C
note.zh: 换液后的蛋白可立即使用或 −80°C 保存

notes.en: Troubleshooting: Slow filtration → protein aggregating on membrane (reduce concentration, add mild detergent 0.01% Tween-20, or switch to lower MWCO). Protein in filtrate → wrong MWCO or membrane integrity issue. Sticky proteins: add BSA 0.1% carrier, or use PES membranes instead of regenerated cellulose.
notes.zh: 排查：过滤慢→蛋白在膜上聚集（降低浓度、加 0.01% Tween-20 或换更小 MWCO）；蛋白在滤液中→MWCO 选错或膜破损；粘性蛋白：加 0.1% BSA 载体蛋白，或换 PES 膜替代再生纤维素膜。

ref: Millipore Amicon Ultra User Guide; Wingfield (2015) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 80:A.3F.1

usage.en: Concentrate and buffer-exchange proteins using Amicon centrifugal ultrafiltration units.
usage.zh: Amicon 超滤离心管浓缩和换液蛋白质。
